Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Nakothi]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 6''' — Nakothi is said to share bodies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 9''' — Nakothi is also referred to as the Dead Mother.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 9''' — Nakothi is an island where Calder is located with the Heart.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 11''' — Nakothi was not friendly with the Lyathatan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 11''' — Nakothi is associated with hideous dead creatures.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — Nakothi has an island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 22''' — Naberius Read the remnants of Nakothi’s body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — Nakothi is a power that can be felt in the air.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 25''' — Nakothi has a Heart.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 25''' — Nakothi has a Handmaiden.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 27''' — Nakothi is a Great Elder that Jerri wouldn't mind staying asleep forever.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 28''' — Nakothi believes she improves humans by warping their bodies into the Children.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 11''' — Nakothi once ruled a portion of the world and shaped the Children for specialized purposes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 11''' — Nakothi laughs in Shera's head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 13''' — Nakothi is capable of harming the Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 13''' — The Heart's song is similar to Nakothi’s song.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 15''' — Nakothi whispered: 'My power can become yours.'}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 16''' — Nakothi's death-throes leveled a continent and created the Aion Sea.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 16''' — Nakothi was one of the last Great Elders to rule before humanity was united.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 16''' — Nakothi ruled the domain of birth and death.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 16''' — Some say Nakothi's touch causes stillbirths.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 16''' — Nakothi is rumored to wait at the bottom of the Aion alongside Kelarac.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 18''' — Nakothi has twelve hearts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 18''' — Nakothi may rise tonight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 19''' — Nakothi's influence can be felt in certain cells like a stench.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 21''' — Nakothi is either dead or asleep.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 22''' — Nakothi has a vast, not-quite-dead body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 22''' — The voice of Nakothi howled through the chamber.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 24''' — Nakothi is a source of vulnerability for Readers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 24''' — Nakothi shouted 'REBIRTH!'}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 25''' — The power of Nakothi is everywhere.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 27''' — The Watchman and his crew intended to harvest a heart from Nakothi’s corpse to attain eternal life.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 3''' — Nakothi desires the malicious destruction of humankind.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 12''' — Nakothi possesses a power that people fight to inherit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 12''' — Nakothi is described as mad.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 13''' — Nakothi is mentioned in relation to Duster's timing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 24''' — Nakothi pursues the perfect balance of life and death.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 1''' — Nakothi was a target of the Liberator's war.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 1''' — Nakothi's death caused devastation that swallowed an entire continent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 3''' — Shera has faced the hordes of Nakothi's living corpses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 5''' — Nakothi is an entity or person the Emperor mentions losing himself to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 7''' — Nakothi is a type of Intent that the Emperor's Intent did not feel like.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 7''' — Nakothi is mentioned in comparison to the Blackwatch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 9''' — Nakothi is a ruler whose authority the human has lived under since birth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 9''' — Nakothi's signature is an insatiable hunger paired with the putrid stench of death.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 9''' — Nakothi's presence is a twisted blend of vibrant life and rotting death.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 9''' — Nakothi's Children are creatures that would attack out of pure malice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 11''' — Shera carries a weapon of Nakothi.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 12''' — Nakothi's power is associated with rebirth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 18''' — Nakothi toys with death.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 18''' — Nakothi has dead monstrosities.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 20''' — The Emperor can be overcome by Nakothi.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 2''' — The Emperor used one of Nakothi’s hearts to stay alive.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 9''' — Bliss does not want anything that Nakothi wants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Nakothi is an unknown entity alongside Kthanikahr, Tharlos, and Othaghor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — Foster used Nakothi in an exclamation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 25''' — Nakothi was wading toward Calder and Shera.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 25''' — Nakothi is a figure capable of corrupting the Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 25''' — Nakothi blurs the lines between life and death.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 25''' — Nakothi's power is a fading shadow of its former self.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 3''' — Nakothi is known as the Dead Mother and her death throes are destroying the land.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 7''' — The Am’haranai once took contracts from Nakothi.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 9''' — The Emperor may have been secretly moved by Nakothi’s influence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 11''' — Nakothi took over the Emperor's mind.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — Jorin theorized Shera might be the only one besides Regents who could threaten Nakothi.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 24''' — Nakothi is an unknown entity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — Shera tore Nakothi’s power from the stirring bodies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 26''' — Nakothi is a being that can take a host and rise to battle the Outsider.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 26''' — Nakothi is a being whose song can be heard in the mind.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 27''' — Nakothi was defeated.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
